summary: DrSam authenticated user SPA module map derived from Bubble IR (drsam-99657): auth/onboarding entry, shared shell and design system, then feature pages dashboard, journal, guided paths, chat, and settings. Public-only surfaces (404, stub page bTGwN) excluded.

modules.title: Auth and onboarding entry
modules.purpose: Password reset (reset_pw), multi-step onboarding wizard (onboarding page), and index login/signup entry paths that gate access to the authenticated SPA.

modules.title: App shell and navigation
modules.purpose: Shared header, sidebar, offline banner, and cross-page chrome mounted on dashboard, journal, paths, settings, and chat. Preserves layout hierarchy from IR reusables.

modules.title: App enums and option sets
modules.purpose: Option sets driving onboarding questions, path tabs, settings tabs, coaching modes, load/health signals, and tier/state labels used across authenticated screens.

modules.title: Shared UI primitives
modules.purpose: Bubble styles to frontend design tokens; shared reusables (progress bar, score bar, session completion form) used across feature pages.

modules.title: Dashboard home
modules.purpose: Main dashboard page after onboarding: daily overview, check-in entry points, and navigation hub into journal, paths, chat, and settings.

modules.title: Journal and check-ins
modules.purpose: Journal page for daily check-ins, journal entries, tags, and related workflows tied to DailyCheckIn and JournalEntry data types.

modules.title: Guided paths
modules.purpose: Paths page for guided path enrollment, path sessions, questions/answers, milestones, and session completion flows.

modules.title: AI chat and messaging
modules.purpose: Chat page and RE-chat reusable: conversation UI, message threads, and chat-related API workflows.

modules.title: Crisis support surfaces
modules.purpose: Crisis support reusable embedded in settings and other flows; safety resources and escalation UI from IR.

modules.title: Settings and account
modules.purpose: Settings page (largest IR surface): profile, subscription, notifications, privacy, workplace, and tabbed settings workflows.

modules.title: Backend API surface
modules.purpose: Incoming API events and external HTTP calls from IR mapped to Supabase edge functions or frontend fetch patterns; read-only reference for adapter decisions.
